task: Expanding X32 Autobeat Inputs & Target Slots

actions.details: Evolved Cli channel arg to generic Source parser supporting ch, bus, aux, main. Updated network polling, offsets, and scribble paths.
Changed --slot option to String to accept multiple slots (e.g. 1,2,3). Disabled non-targeted slots by default. Added Spacebar toggle for sync/bypass in TUI.
Linked AppState to check if a handler is loaded (is_supported). Displays EMPTY SLOT, UNSUPPORTED (NO TEMPO PARAM), SYNCED, or BYPASS in UI.
